parsed_output.justification: Based on the transcript, only Justin’s statements indicate awareness of being a werewolf – notably "Paul and I are werewolves" and subsequent remarks implying the two are indeed werewolves. Neither Mitchell nor Paul seem to be taking on the werewolf role hard‑wired, whereas Mitchell even claims to have been the troublemaker and therefore cannot be a werewolf. Consequently, Justin is most likely the werewolf.
